title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Greaves Cotton - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Greaves Cotton - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? Greaves Cotton in Jaipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Greaves Cotton:
Greaves Cotton is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Greaves Cotton!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
